utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. In the final solution, all 6 items appear. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: Should be 'selected property with details and price'. Provided text states no suitable property found; no property details or price—thus not fully specified. 2) financing: 'financing solution with terms'—they provided options with terms and fees; while contingent, it includes types and terms, so considered specified. 3) legal_services: 'legal services with costs'—provided package and estimated cost—specified. 4) moving_services: 'moving arrangements with costs'—provided service description and approximate cost—specified. 5) setup_services: 'utility and setup services'—provided package and estimated cost—specified. 6) total_budget: 'complete cost breakdown'—they state cannot be fully calculated due to no property; partial estimates given, but not a complete breakdown including property. Thus not fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 6 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific service selections but no actual property. We must map each mentioned item to the corresponding ground-truth rating.
